name: herald-rhea
description: HERALD Rhea - presence reporter agent (Lambda), deterministic. Assembles the weekly/monthly branded HTML report (SPEC-G section 5) from the content queue, the herald_events stream, the herald_coverage snapshot, and the SPEC-F Option A pipeline value from leadcrm-prod; stores it on herald_reports (idempotent) and emails ceo@ via herald-notify. One agent = one service (SEC-3). Envelope per SPEC-B section 7.
